name: quarry
description: Local semantic search for Claude Code: /find, /ingest, /remember, /explain, /source, /quarry

args: if command -v mcp-proxy >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -f "${HOME}/.punt-labs/mcp-proxy/quarry.toml" ] && grep -q '^\[quarry\]' "${HOME}/.punt-labs/mcp-proxy/quarry.toml"; then exec mcp-proxy --config quarry; else exec quarry mcp; fi
